title: TMC Mine Pack
description: A funny resource pack for TrappedMC that changes the mines to look like resource mine
body:
### This pack is intended for the TrappedMC prison server (`trappedmc.com`) Note: This pack is made for fun and has not been officially supported by TrappedMC # Overview Changes the textures of blocks in Mine X and above
Makes the mines more colourful and easier to tell blocks apart
Compatible with most other resource packs ## NEW: More mine styles Added a bunch of new packs so you can customize the mine colour to your liking. [Download here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rmbm/changelog)
Currently: - Stone - Deepslate - Netherrack - Diorite - Resource Mine \+ Ore Blocks Pack: makes ores look like their full block forms and stand out more. Can be overlaid on top of other packs here. ## Crazy Version If you want it to more accurately resemble Resource Mine, the Crazy version randomizes the texture of netherrack between various Resource Mine blocks.
However, telling the blocks apart becomes harder. Both versions are included so try which one you prefer! ## Before: ![Before](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/881caf2a559dee745ce73d81feee44b53dc8c4cf.png) ## After: ![After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e8ebfda6627f2105e6ab6c34acde540093cfcea.png) ## Changes - Netherrack -> Dirt [/Gravel/Sand/Clay] - Red Terracotta -> Stone - Nether Bricks -> Warped Hyphae - Red Nether Bricks -> Crimson Hyphae - Ores -> Concrete Powder - Ice -> Sand [Light Blue Concrete Powder] - and some more secret changes [] = Crazy version ## Credits - `stuckymoss2`: Made randomized textures for Crazy version
#ResourceMineBestMine
